description: Draft compatibility rules for secondary traits. This is not a complete rule database.

rules.notes: Current tool wrote this combination and raw save fields verified. Full in-game legality still should be tested before broad GUI release.
rules.source: Generated save output and current code

rules.notes: Level 30 was written as a test value. Treat as experimental until the real Greater Aegis max level is verified.
rules.source: Generated save output and current code

rules.notes: Alpha+ normally defaults to DMG Cap as its secondary trait. The editor keeps DMG Cap preselected but allows overriding it for offline/local impossible-sigil testing.
rules.source: Nenkai Sigil/Gem IDs, Nenkai Trait/Skill IDs, and user offline testing requirement

rules.notes: Beta+ normally defaults to DMG Cap as its secondary trait. The editor keeps DMG Cap preselected but allows overriding it for offline/local impossible-sigil testing.

globalRules.description: The future GUI should hide secondary traits that are not present in a verified allow-list for the selected + sigil, until a complete ban/allow table is extracted.
The backend must validate the selected sigil, primary trait, secondary trait, and levels against these local data files before writing.

todos: Extract complete secondary trait pools from gem.SkillTypeLotIdForRandom2ndSkill and related skill lot tables.
Add explicit banned secondary traits once verified.
Keep this file as the backend validation source, not only a GUI filter.
